gloss: huraza zatide vora tikahu leba bagogo mino firano lerago wugo ledego; zapuse gofivo wuwuti wumile setiwu wugo vosemi humifi nowu gohu babade; kago gotide wuno fifiwu hufi ledele leleno goti node fihu fipu; kahufi goseza wuka seti kazavo banode ramifi bago mimino puza bafira; fifi ramira wuzati kamiwu noka nowu mika rale mifi sele notiza
